name: CheckSecurityUpdates
description: Checks for pending Windows security updates using the Windows Update COM API and lists any missing updates.

name: CheckTimeSync
description: Checks current time sync status, W32Time service state, and NTP server configuration against AU pool servers.

name: checkWinUpdate
description: Retrieves the Windows Update log and displays it in a formatted table with timestamps, KB numbers, titles, results, and error codes.

name: Get-EndpointHealth
description: Comprehensive MSP diagnostic tool. Checks CPU, memory, disk, network, services, and uptime. Paste into a remote terminal session.

name: Get-EventLogExport
description: Exports System, Application, Security, and Setup event logs (last 48h) to a ZIP of .evtx files. Output goes to C:\Temp.

name: getGraphicsDriverDate
description: Checks Dell update service logs for graphics driver update history. Supports NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel GPUs.

name: Get-SystemDetails
description: Displays OS edition, version, build, architecture, hardware manufacturer and model, active user, install date, and system uptime.

name: getWanIP
description: Retrieves the public WAN IP address via Cloudflare's trace endpoint.

name: OutlookCheck
description: Checks if Outlook is running and validates DNS resolution for outlook.office365.com.

name: performanceCheck
description: Checks system performance including critical services, memory usage, disk space, and pending Windows updates.

name: RemoveNetskope
description: Fully uninstalls the Netskope client including the service, MSI product, and all data directories.

name: Remove-NetworkDrives
description: Removes all connected network drives and reports what was removed. Handles both user and SYSTEM context.

name: remove-print-jobs
description: Clears all pending print jobs across all installed printers.

name: SetLocalAdmin
description: Creates or enables a local administrator account with a non-expiring password and non-expiring account.

name: TimeFix
description: Forces NTP time resync using AU pool servers and Cloudflare/Google/Microsoft time. Selects the fastest responding server.

name: UnlockSetNeverExpire
description: Enables a local user account and sets the password to never expire. Shows before/after state.
config_note: Set $user to the target username before running.

name: uptime
description: Displays current system uptime in hours (if under 24h) or days.

name: Verify-FastStartupDisabled
description: Checks if Windows Fast Startup (HiberbootEnabled) is disabled via the registry. Returns true if disabled.

name: Verify-SecureBoot
description: Checks if Secure Boot is enabled on the system using Confirm-SecureBootUEFI.

name: Verify-TPMStatus
description: Checks if the TPM chip is present and ready using Get-Tpm. Returns true if TPM is enabled and working.

name: windows11Check
description: Checks if current hardware meets Windows 11 requirements including TPM 2.0, CPU, RAM, storage, and Secure Boot.

name: WIP_ClearBrowserCache
description: Clears browser cache across installed browsers.

name: WIP_diskClean
description: Automates disk cleanup to free up space.

name: extract_recovery_key
description: Checks if FileVault is enabled and extracts the FileVault recovery key.

name: get-EndpointHealth
description: Comprehensive MSP diagnostic tool for macOS. Checks hardware, disk, network, and services. Paste into a remote terminal session.

name: macRename
description: Fixes macOS hostnames that gain a .local suffix due to Bluetooth or AirDrop activity. Resets the hostname via scutil.

name: checkEmail
description: Finds all recipients and distribution groups a given email address is associated with in Exchange Online.

name: Clone-SPGroups
description: Copies SP_ SharePoint group memberships from a source user to a target user via Microsoft Graph.

name: getCalPerms
description: Retrieves calendar permissions for a mailbox via the Microsoft Graph API using client credentials.

name: getUserGUID
description: Looks up a user's Object ID / GUID from Microsoft Graph by UPN.

name: listUsers
description: Lists all users in a tenant via the Microsoft Graph API using OAuth client credentials flow.

name: TenantDataExport
description: Template script to export M365 tenant data (users, Exchange, OneDrive, SharePoint, licenses) to an Excel workbook.
config_note: Template script — review and configure before running. Requires ImportExcel module.

name: ConfigAPI_Test
description: Tests connectivity to the 3CX Configuration API using the /xapi/v1/Defs endpoint with Bearer token auth.
config_note: Set $BaseUrl, $ClientId, and $ApiKey at the top of the script before running.

name: get3CXVersion
description: Authenticates to a 3CX PBX via OAuth client credentials and retrieves the current PBX version.
